title: Magnet Mod
body:
# Items
This mod adds 2 new items in tools tab: Magnet and Creative Magnet.
# Magnets
Magnet item has a craft. If the magnet is in the inventory it will teleport items to the player in a 5x5x5 block area,
If the magnet is in the dominant hand, it will teleport items to the player in a 10x10x10 block area.
Creative Magnet has no crafting. It can only be obtained in creative. This magnet teleports all items to the player depending on the render distance
# Commands
/togglemagnet - To use this command, you need permission level 4 specifically for multiplayer.
Turns all magnets on and off.
